name: hashgoblin-bot
description: Discord economy bot with Glory currency, SHA-256 proof receipts, exact odds, global leaderboards, greetings, auto-roles, admin audit tools and deployment-safe Discord setup templates.

scripts.check: node --check src/bootstrap.js && node --check src/index.js && node --check src/deploy-commands.js && find src -name '*.js' -not -path 'src/bootstrap.js' -not -path 'src/index.js' -not -path 'src/deploy-commands.js' -print0 | xargs -0 -n1 node --check
scripts.preflight: npm run check && npm run test && npm run test:slot-animation && npm run test:bootstrap && npm run smoke && npm run release-check
